scope: Physical Quantum Qi runtime contract, typed validation, downgrade behavior, authority boundary, and CI entrypoints
core_claims: Qi is evidence-bound relation-flow on the conventional appearance side
Qi is not K and must not reify emptiness
PhysicalQi requires current, gauge, curvature, Ward/leak, open quantum thermodynamic, recoverability, and mass-gap-floor evidence
FullPathQi requires additional SK/FV history evidence
33/20 mass gap is a stable floor for K_perp Qi flow domain, not a Qi source
Runtime validation separates claimed_type from validated_type
